## `vector` [promql-fn-vector]

{applies_to}`stack: preview 9.4.0` {applies_to}`serverless: preview`

Returns the scalar as a vector with no labels.

Returns `instant_vector`.

### Parameters

`s` (`scalar`)
:   Scalar value.

### Example

```
vector(1)
```
